Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Really ? Can you not think of anything else to chat about ?

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I-- I am sorry. I did not mean for that to come out so accusatoire. I am happy that you offered to listen, but it is not something I want to--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: His eyes squeeze closed, enough that the wrinkles show through his evenly-applied foundation. French Kweebec scoffs to himself before taking a deep breath.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: You are right. You did not say it, but I think that this is not making me a great partenaire in conversation. So, let us talk about the one thing that mon esprit obstiné cannot let go of.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Earlier, our one brave courrier climbed the tree. Normalement, this is a joyous occasion, but he brought some nouvelles terribles. It has haunted me since.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The air is silent again, but for the chatter of distant Kweebecs and the overly loud creaking of their decrepit market. French Kweebec deliberates on his next words but, for a time, his restless fingers put in way more effort than his tongue.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: This goes on for so long that your mind involuntarily flits through the possibilities. Are berets outlawed? Was France set ablaze by another revolution?  Was his family fed to a Trork woodchipper?

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Just as your thoughts turn more and more bizarre, he speaks up--
